potential_consequence: Next.js SSR will render an empty string. When React hydrates on the client, it will see full sanitized HTML, causing a React Hydration Error. Additionally, SEO bots might only see the empty SSR content.

trigger_condition: content is extremely large (e.g., 500kb of HTML)
potential_consequence: Sanitization blocks the main thread during render, causing UI jank. Needs useMemo.

trigger_condition: DOMPurify returns valid HTML but document.createElement fails or image traversal throws
potential_consequence: Component crashes without a fallback. Try/catch could prevent full page crash.
